critiques.summary: Read the close-out gate wiring and the artifact validator over the repo. One real defect: the gate fired on a non-terminal close.

findings.description: The close-out check fires on every session close, not only the set-terminal close, so a mid-set close on a `required` set would block.

critiques.summary: Independently read the attribute machinery and the multi-provider validator with repo access. The immutability path and the distinct-provider check hold; no defects found.
